overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character navigates city streets and pedestrian plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense crowds of NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city street with elevated highway overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching a building entrance with a glowing sign

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in bright holographic advertisements and neon signage
building entrance with illuminated 'Lucky Star' signage and glass doors
concrete and metal barriers separating sidewalk from street
overhead highway structure with support columns spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by towering neon billboards on the left and the Lucky Star building entrance on the right. The player walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, passing other pedestrians, with an elevated highway visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food stalls and corporate building entrance

events.description: turns right off the main street into an open plaza area with food stalls
slows down while navigating around concrete barriers in the plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right into a plaza area and walking past container food stalls toward a building entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall counter

entered.detail: shipping container converted to food stall with bright interior lighting
blue neon corporate signage reading 'DATA INC' on building facade
open pedestrian area with scattered furniture and barriers

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a more open plaza area, leaving the main street behind. Food stalls and the Data Inc building become prominent as the Lucky Star entrance recedes into the background. The space is less crowded with scattered pedestrians and container-style food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with restaurants and shops

events.description: passes under an overhang entering a semi-covered walkway with different lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing concrete planters and approaching a restaurant with red neon signage

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing distinctive blue hair and glasses

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'kabayan FOODS' on building facade
large circular concrete planter with palm tree
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover over sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the street, passing large concrete planters with palm trees. The Kabayan Foods restaurant with its prominent red neon sign becomes visible on the right. The environment transitions to a semi-covered walkway with an overhead roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian zone with escalators and outdoor dining

events.description: enters fully covered area beneath building overpass with escalators visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway, observing the escalators and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table under umbrella

entered.detail: metal and glass escalator structure with blue lighting leading upward
plastic chairs and tables with large umbrellas under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a covered pedestrian area beneath a building overpass. The player walks past outdoor seating with umbrellas and approaches a futuristic escalator structure with blue accent lighting. The Kabayan Foods sign is now behind as the environment becomes more enclosed and artificially lit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling, neon-lit main thoroughfare into a more enclosed, artificially lit pedestrian underpass. It begins on a crowded city street dominated by towering billboards and the Lucky Star building entrance, moving forward beneath an elevated highway. As the camera turns right, the dense street traffic gives way to an open plaza featuring food stalls and the Data Inc building. The scene then shifts toward a semi-covered walkway, passing concrete planters with palm trees and the red neon glow of Kabayan Foods. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves beneath a building overpass, passing outdoor seating with umbrellas toward a futuristic escalator accented with blue lighting.
